name: selzy-openclaw--selzy-api-skill
description: Create and send email marketing campaigns via Selzy API. Manage contacts, segments, templates. Schedule campaigns, run A/B tests, and analyze performance (opens, clicks, bounces). Turn natural language requests into full email campaigns. **v2.1 — Fixed critical bug:** Campaigns now require explicit list_id verification. Without list_id, Selzy sends to 1 contact only. Always call getLists first.
